title: Mighty Malaysian Chicken Skewers
description: Tangy, dense, quick-fix Malaysian chicken skewers packed with chili and citrus, perfect for a low-carb dinner.
instructions: Thread the chicken cubes onto the soaked bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a bowl whisk together coconut aminos, lime juice, minced garlic, minced ginger, chili powder, fish sauce, honey, salt, pepper and coconut oil until well combined.
Brush the sauce generously over the chicken skewers, reserving a small amount for basting during grilling.
Preheat a charcoal grill or grill pan to medium-high heat and lightly oil the grates.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 7 minutes, turning every 2 minutes and basting with the reserved sauce.
Continue grilling until the chicken reaches an internal temperature of 75°C and is charred on the edges.
Remove the skewers from the grill, let them rest for 2 minutes, then squeeze an extra splash of lime over each skewer.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with fresh cilantro and lime wedges.
